terminal.title: portfolio@mahmoud:~
welcome: Welcome to my interactive portfolio terminal!
You can learn everything you want about me by interacting with this terminal via typing commands,
by using natural language in chat mode,
Or by simply selecting a tab from the menu above.
Type 'chat' to open my AI chatbot for natural language questions.
terminal.helpHeader: Available commands  (You can type them in the terminal or click on the command to input it):
terminal.helpFooter: Type any command to see more information.

commands.chat: Start a conversation with Gallillio, my personal AI that knows everything about me

enter: You are now talking to my AI assistant.
Ask me anything about my skills, experience, or projects.
Type 'exit' to return to command mode.
chat.exit: [chat mode deactivated. back to command mode.]

notFoundPage.hint: the page you're looking for doesn't exist.
